SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class ServerResponse

java.lang.Object
common.dto.ServerResponse
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ServerResponse extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a response sent from the server to the client.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private long
    correlationId
    Echoes the request's correlation id so the client can match the reply.
    private Object
    data
    Optional response payload (a DTO or list), or null.
    private String
    message
    Human-readable status/error message.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization-format version identifier.
    private boolean
    success
    Whether the requested operation succeeded.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ServerResponse(boolean success, String message)
    Creates a response without additional data.
    ServerResponse(boolean success, String message, Object data)
    Creates a response with additional data.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    getCorrelationId()
    Returns the correlation id matching this reply to its request.
    Object
    getData()
    Returns the response payload, or null if none.
    String
    getMessage()
    Returns the status or error message.
    boolean
    isSuccess()
    Returns whether the operation succeeded.
    void
    setCorrelationId(long correlationId)
    Sets the correlation id echoed back to the client.

  • Constructor Details

    • ServerResponse

      public ServerResponse(boolean success, String message)
      Creates a response without additional data.
      Parameters:
      success - operation status
      message - response message

    • ServerResponse

      public ServerResponse(boolean success, String message, Object data)
      Creates a response with additional data.
      Parameters:
      success - operation status
      message - response message
      data - response payload

      Returns whether the operation succeeded.

      Returns the response payload, or null if none.

    • getCorrelationId

      public long getCorrelationId()
      Returns the correlation id matching this reply to its request.
      Returns:
      the correlation id matching this reply to its request

    • setCorrelationId

      public void setCorrelationId(long correlationId)
      Sets the correlation id echoed back to the client.
      Parameters:
      correlationId - the id of the request this response answers
